recipes.title: ActiFry Crispy Paprika Chicken Thighs
steps: Pat the chicken thighs very dry with paper towels (this is key for crispy skin).
In a small bowl, mix paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, pepper, and (optional) cornstarch until evenly combined.
Drizzle the chicken with olive oil and rub to coat all sides.
Sprinkle the seasoning mix over the chicken and rub again so the spices adhere evenly (including under any loose skin edges).
Preheat the ActiFry/air fryer to 200°C (390°F) for 3 minutes (if your model doesn’t preheat, skip this step).
Arrange the thighs in the basket in a single layer with some space between pieces; cook in batches if needed.
Cook at 200°C (390°F) for 12 minutes to start crisping the skin.
Flip the thighs skin-side down and cook for 10 minutes.
Flip again skin-side up and cook for 8–12 minutes more, until the thickest part reaches 75°C / 165°F internal temperature.
Rest the chicken for 5 minutes before serving so the juices redistribute.

recipes.title: Garlic Lemon Chicken Drumsticks
steps: Pat the drumsticks dry with paper towels to remove surface moisture.
In a bowl, whisk olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Add drumsticks to the bowl and toss until fully coated.
Let the chicken marinate for 10 minutes at room temperature (or cover and refrigerate up to 8 hours; if chilled, bring closer to room temp for 15 minutes before cooking).
Preheat the ActiFry/air fryer to 190°C (375°F) for 3 minutes.
Place drumsticks in the basket in a single layer; avoid stacking.
Cook at 190°C (375°F) for 15 minutes.
Flip each drumstick and cook 10 minutes.
Increase to 200°C (390°F) and cook 3–6 minutes to deepen browning (watch closely).
Check internal temperature reaches 75°C / 165°F; rest 5 minutes, then serve with extra lemon wedges.

recipes.title: Buffalo-Style ActiFry Chicken Wings
ingredients: 1.2 kg chicken wings, split (drums and flats)
steps: Pat wings completely dry with paper towels; moisture prevents crisping.
In a bowl, mix salt, pepper, garlic powder, and baking powder.
Add wings and toss until evenly coated with the dry mix.
Preheat the ActiFry/air fryer to 200°C (390°F) for 3 minutes.
Arrange wings in a single layer; cook in batches if needed for best crisp.
Cook at 200°C (390°F) for 12 minutes.
Flip the wings and cook 12 minutes more.
Flip again and cook 6–10 minutes more until deeply golden and crisp; wings should reach 75°C / 165°F internally.
While wings finish, whisk buffalo sauce with melted butter in a large bowl.
Transfer hot wings to the bowl and toss until evenly coated; serve immediately.

recipes.title: Juicy Herb-Rub Chicken Breast
steps: Pat chicken dry and place in a bowl.
Add olive oil, salt, pepper, herbs, garlic powder, paprika, and (optional) honey; rub to coat all surfaces evenly.
Preheat the ActiFry/air fryer to 190°C (375°F) for 3 minutes.
Place chicken breasts in the basket leaving space between them.
Cook at 190°C (375°F) for 7 minutes.
Flip the chicken and cook another 5–8 minutes depending on thickness.
Check the thickest part reaches 75°C / 165°F; if not, add 2 minutes and recheck.
Remove chicken and rest 6–8 minutes (do not skip; resting keeps it juicy).
Slice against the grain and serve.

recipes.title: Honey Garlic Glazed Chicken Thigh Bites
ingredients: 700g boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into 3–4 cm pieces
1 tbsp rice vinegar (or apple cider vinegar)
steps: Pat chicken pieces dry; place in a bowl.
Season with salt and pepper, drizzle olive oil, then sprinkle cornstarch over the chicken and toss until each piece has a light coating.
Preheat the ActiFry/air fryer to 200°C (390°F) for 3 minutes.
Add chicken in a single layer (cook in batches if crowded).
Cook at 200°C (390°F) for 10 minutes.
Shake/stir the basket to separate pieces and brown evenly; cook 6–8 minutes more until cooked through (75°C / 165°F).
While chicken cooks, make glaze: in a small saucepan, combine honey, soy sauce, vinegar, and garlic. Simmer 2–3 minutes until slightly thickened (or microwave 45–60 seconds, stirring halfway).
Transfer cooked chicken to a bowl and pour glaze over it; toss until fully coated.
Return glazed chicken to the basket and cook 2–3 minutes at 200°C (390°F) to caramelize (watch so it doesn’t burn).
Finish with (optional) sesame oil; serve over rice or with steamed veggies.

recipes.title: Crispy Parmesan Chicken Tenders
ingredients: 600g chicken tenders (or sliced chicken breast strips)
Cooking spray or 1 tbsp olive oil (for crisping)
steps: Pat tenders dry and season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
In a shallow bowl, beat the eggs.
In another shallow bowl, mix parmesan and panko until evenly combined.
Dip each tender into egg, letting excess drip off.
Press the tender into the parmesan-panko mix, coating all sides; place on a plate.
Preheat the ActiFry/air fryer to 200°C (390°F) for 3 minutes.
Arrange tenders in a single layer; lightly spray tops with cooking spray (or brush with a little oil).
Cook at 200°C (390°F) for 6 minutes.
Flip each tender, spray the other side lightly, and cook 5–7 minutes more until golden and 75°C / 165°F inside.
Rest 3 minutes; serve with marinara, ranch, or honey mustard.

recipes.title: BBQ ActiFry Chicken Wings
ingredients: 120 ml BBQ sauce (thick style works best)
1 tsp apple cider vinegar (optional, brightens sauce)
steps: Pat wings completely dry with paper towels.
Mix salt, pepper, paprika, and baking powder; toss wings until evenly coated.
Preheat the ActiFry/air fryer to 200°C (390°F) for 3 minutes.
Arrange wings in a single layer; cook in batches if needed.
Cook at 200°C (390°F) for 12 minutes.
Flip wings and cook 12 minutes more.
Cook 6–10 minutes more, flipping once, until crispy and cooked through (75°C / 165°F).
In a bowl, mix BBQ sauce with (optional) vinegar.
Toss hot wings in sauce until evenly coated.
Return sauced wings to the basket and cook 2–4 minutes at 200°C (390°F) to set the glaze; watch closely to avoid burning.

recipes.title: Chicken Shawarma Strips
ingredients: 700g boneless skinless chicken thighs, sliced into strips
steps: In a bowl, mix yogurt, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, paprika, turmeric, coriander, salt, and pepper.
Add chicken strips and toss until fully coated.
Marinate 15 minutes at room temperature (or cover and refrigerate up to 12 hours; if chilled, rest 10–15 minutes before cooking).
Preheat the ActiFry/air fryer to 200°C (390°F) for 3 minutes.
Place chicken strips in a single layer (cook in batches if needed).
Cook at 200°C (390°F) for 8 minutes.
Shake/toss to separate strips and brown evenly; cook another 6–8 minutes until cooked through (75°C / 165°F).
Taste a piece for doneness and seasoning; add a pinch of salt if needed.
Rest 3 minutes, then serve in pita/wraps or bowls.
Optional serving: add sliced cucumber, tomato, and a yogurt sauce.

recipes.title: ActiFry Chicken Fajita Bowl Chicken
steps: In a bowl, combine olive oil, chili powder, cumin, paprika, garlic powder, salt, pepper, and lime juice.
Add chicken strips and toss until evenly coated.
If using peppers/onions, toss them in the same bowl to coat lightly with seasoning residue (add 1 tsp oil if needed).
Preheat the ActiFry/air fryer to 200°C (390°F) for 3 minutes.
Add chicken strips to the basket in a single layer (cook in batches if crowded).
Cook at 200°C (390°F) for 6 minutes.
Shake/toss the basket to separate strips; add peppers/onions (if using) and cook 6–8 minutes more until chicken reaches 75°C / 165°F.
If you want more char, cook 2 minutes extra, shaking once.
Rest 3 minutes, then serve over rice with beans, salsa, and avocado.
Store leftovers in an airtight container up to 3 days.

recipes.title: Mediterranean Chicken Skewers
ingredients: 700g chicken thighs (boneless), cut into 3 cm cubes
Wooden skewers (soaked 20 minutes) or metal skewers
steps: If using wooden skewers, soak them in water for 20 minutes to reduce burning.
In a bowl, mix olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, pepper, and paprika.
Add chicken cubes and toss thoroughly until coated; marinate 15 minutes (or refrigerate up to 8 hours).
Thread chicken onto skewers, leaving a little space between pieces for airflow.
Preheat the ActiFry/air fryer to 200°C (390°F) for 3 minutes.
Place skewers in the basket/tray so they are not stacked; cook in batches if needed.
Cook at 200°C (390°F) for 8 minutes.
Turn skewers carefully and cook another 6–8 minutes until chicken reaches 75°C / 165°F.
If you want more color, cook 2 minutes extra, turning once.
Rest 3–5 minutes; serve with a salad or tzatziki-style yogurt sauce.

recipes.title: Classic ActiFry French Fries
steps: Peel the potatoes if desired, then cut into evenly sized sticks about 1 cm thick.
Place the cut potatoes in a large bowl and cover completely with cold water.
Soak for 30 minutes to remove excess starch (this improves crispness).
Drain the potatoes and dry them very thoroughly with clean kitchen towels.
Place potatoes in a bowl, drizzle with olive oil, and toss until lightly coated.
Preheat the ActiFry to 180°C (360°F) for 3 minutes.
Add potatoes to the basket in a single layer.
Cook for 18 minutes, then shake or stir to separate fries.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F) and cook another 8–12 minutes until golden and crisp.
Transfer to a bowl, season with salt while hot, and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Crispy Sweet Potato Fries
steps: Peel sweet potatoes and cut into evenly sized sticks.
Place fries in a bowl, sprinkle with cornstarch, and toss until lightly coated.
Add olive oil, salt, paprika, and pepper; toss again until evenly seasoned.
Preheat the ActiFry to 180°C (360°F) for 3 minutes.
Place fries in the basket in a single layer.
Cook for 15 minutes, shaking halfway through.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F) and cook 8–10 minutes more until crisp on edges.
Check texture; cook an additional 2–3 minutes if needed.
Remove and season lightly with extra salt if desired.
Serve hot as a side or snack.

recipes.title: Garlic Roasted Baby Potatoes
steps: Wash baby potatoes and cut larger ones in half so all are similar size.
Place potatoes in a bowl and drizzle with olive oil.
Add garlic, rosemary, salt, and pepper; toss thoroughly.
Preheat the ActiFry to 190°C (375°F) for 3 minutes.
Add potatoes to the basket in a single layer.
Cook for 20 minutes, shaking halfway through.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F) and cook 8–10 minutes more until browned.
Test tenderness with a fork; potatoes should be soft inside.
Adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot with grilled meats or chicken.

recipes.title: Parmesan Herb Potato Wedges
steps: Wash potatoes well and cut each into thick wedges.
Place wedges in a bowl and drizzle with olive oil.
Add garlic powder, herbs, salt, and pepper; toss until coated.
Preheat the ActiFry to 180°C (360°F).
Place wedges in the basket skin-side down where possible.
Cook for 18 minutes, then flip wedges.
Cook another 10 minutes until golden.
Sprinkle parmesan evenly over the wedges.
Return to ActiFry and cook 3–4 minutes until cheese melts and lightly browns.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Loaded ActiFry Potato Bites
steps: Parboil potatoes in salted water for 8 minutes; drain and let steam dry.
Place potatoes in a bowl, add olive oil, salt, and paprika; toss well.
Preheat the ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Cook potatoes for 20 minutes, shaking halfway.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F) and cook 8 minutes until crispy.
Sprinkle cheese and bacon over potatoes.
Return to ActiFry and cook 2–3 minutes until cheese melts.
Transfer to a serving bowl.
Top with sour cream and green onions.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: Cajun Spiced Potato Fries
steps: Cut potatoes into even sticks and soak in cold water for 20 minutes.
Drain and dry potatoes completely.
Toss potatoes with cornstarch until lightly coated.
Add olive oil, Cajun seasoning, and salt; toss again.
Preheat the ActiFry to 180°C (360°F).
Cook fries for 18 minutes, shaking once.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F).
Cook another 8–12 minutes until crispy.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Rosemary Garlic Potato Cubes
steps: Cut potatoes into 2 cm cubes.
Rinse briefly under cold water and dry well.
Place in a bowl with olive oil, rosemary, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Add potatoes and cook 22 minutes, shaking halfway.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F).
Cook another 8–10 minutes until crispy outside and tender inside.
Check doneness with a fork.
Rest 2 minutes before serving.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: Potato Hash ActiFry Style
steps: Dice potatoes into small, even cubes.
Rinse briefly and dry thoroughly.
Toss potatoes with olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Cook potatoes for 15 minutes.
Add diced onion and stir well.
Cook another 10–12 minutes until potatoes are browned.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Cook 2 more minutes if extra crisp is desired.
Serve hot, ideal for breakfast bowls.

recipes.title: Cheesy Scalloped Potatoes
steps: Slice potatoes very thin using a knife or mandoline.
Toss slices with olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Preheat ActiFry to 180°C (360°F).
Arrange potato slices in overlapping layers in a heat-safe ActiFry dish or foil tray.
Cook for 25 minutes until potatoes soften.
Sprinkle mozzarella and parmesan evenly over the top.
Return to ActiFry and cook 6–8 minutes until cheese melts and bubbles.
Let rest 5 minutes before serving.
Check tenderness and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve warm.

recipes.title: ActiFry Breakfast Potatoes
steps: Dice potatoes into small cubes.
Rinse briefly and dry thoroughly.
Toss potatoes with olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Cook potatoes for 20 minutes, shaking halfway.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F).
Cook another 8–10 minutes until crispy.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Let rest 2 minutes.
Serve as breakfast side or base for bowls.

recipes.title: ActiFry Crispy Chicken Nuggets
ingredients: 600 g boneless skinless chicken breast, cut into bite-size pieces
Cooking spray or 1 tbsp olive oil
steps: Pat chicken pieces dry with paper towels.
Season chicken lightly with salt and pepper.
Beat eggs in a shallow bowl.
In another bowl, mix panko, parmesan, and garlic powder.
Dip each chicken piece into egg, letting excess drip off.
Roll chicken in breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Preheat the ActiFry to 200°C (390°F) for 3 minutes.
Arrange nuggets in a single layer in the basket.
Lightly spray with oil.
Cook for 6 minutes, flip nuggets, spray again, and cook 6–8 minutes more until golden and cooked through (75°C / 165°F).

recipes.title: Mozzarella Sticks
steps: Freeze mozzarella sticks for at least 30 minutes to prevent leaking.
Prepare three bowls: flour in one, beaten eggs in another, breadcrumbs mixed with salt and Italian seasoning in the third.
Roll each frozen cheese stick in flour, then egg, then breadcrumbs.
Repeat egg and breadcrumb coating for a thicker crust.
Return coated sticks to freezer for 10 minutes.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Place sticks in a single layer in the basket.
Spray lightly with oil.
Cook for 5–7 minutes, watching closely until golden.
Remove immediately and let rest 1 minute.
Serve with warm marinara sauce.

recipes.title: Crispy ActiFry Onion Rings
steps: Separate onion slices into individual rings.
Set up breading station with flour, beaten eggs, and panko mixed with paprika and salt.
Dip onion rings into flour, then egg, then breadcrumbs.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Arrange onion rings in a single layer.
Spray lightly with oil.
Cook for 6 minutes, flip, and cook another 6–8 minutes until crisp and golden.
Remove and season lightly with extra salt if desired.
Rest 1 minute before serving.
Serve hot with dipping sauce.

recipes.title: ActiFry Chicken Quesadilla Bites
ingredients: 1 cup shredded cheddar or Mexican blend cheese
steps: Cut tortillas into small squares.
Mix chicken, cheese, and bell pepper in a bowl.
Place a spoonful of filling between two tortilla squares to form small pockets.
Lightly spray outside with oil.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place bites seam-side down in the basket.
Cook for 6 minutes, flip gently.
Cook another 5–6 minutes until tortillas are crisp and cheese melted.
Let rest 2 minutes.
Serve warm.

recipes.title: Stuffed Jalapeño Poppers
steps: Slice jalapeños lengthwise and remove seeds.
Mix cream cheese, cheddar, and garlic powder.
Fill each jalapeño half with cheese mixture.
Press filled side into panko breadcrumbs.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Arrange poppers in basket.
Spray lightly with oil.
Cook 10 minutes until tops are golden.
Rest 2 minutes before serving.
Serve warm.

recipes.title: ActiFry Mini Sausage Rolls
steps: Roll puff pastry flat and cut into strips.
Season sausage meat with black pepper.
Place sausage along pastry strips and roll tightly.
Brush seam with beaten egg to seal.
Cut into bite-size pieces.
Preheat ActiFry to 180°C (360°F).
Place rolls seam-side down.
Cook 12 minutes, flip pieces.
Cook another 8–10 minutes until golden.
Rest 3 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: ActiFry Pizza Toast Bites
steps: Cut bread into quarters.
Spread a thin layer of pizza sauce on each piece.
Top with mozzarella and pepperoni.
Preheat ActiFry to 180°C (360°F).
Place bread pieces in basket.
Cook 6 minutes until cheese melts.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F).
Cook 2–3 minutes more until lightly crisp.
Remove carefully.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: Crispy ActiFry Chickpeas
ingredients: 400 g canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed
steps: Dry chickpeas thoroughly with paper towels.
Toss chickpeas with olive oil and spices.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Add chickpeas to basket.
Cook 15 minutes, shaking every 5 minutes.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F).
Cook another 5 minutes until crisp.
Let cool slightly to fully crisp.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Serve as snack or salad topping.

recipes.title: ActiFry Corn Dog Bites
steps: Cut hot dogs into bite-size pieces.
Mix cornmeal, flour, baking powder, and salt.
Whisk egg and milk, then combine with dry ingredients.
Dip hot dog pieces into batter.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place battered pieces in basket.
Cook 10 minutes, turning halfway.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F).
Cook 3–5 minutes until golden.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Crispy Tofu Cubes
ingredients: 400 g firm tofu, pressed and cubed
steps: Press tofu for at least 15 minutes to remove moisture.
Cut tofu into evenly sized cubes.
Toss tofu with soy sauce, olive oil, garlic powder, and cornstarch.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Add tofu cubes to basket in a single layer.
Cook for 10 minutes, shaking halfway.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until golden.
Taste and add salt if needed.
Rest 2 minutes.
Serve as snack or protein add-in.

recipes.title: ActiFry Lemon Garlic Shrimp
ingredients: 450 g raw shrimp, peeled and deveined
steps: Pat shrimp completely dry with paper towels.
Place shrimp in a bowl and add olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Toss until shrimp are evenly coated.
Preheat the ActiFry to 190°C (375°F) for 3 minutes.
Place shrimp in the basket in a single layer.
Cook for 6 minutes.
Shake the basket to redistribute shrimp.
Cook another 3–4 minutes until shrimp are opaque and curled.
Check doneness; shrimp should be firm and pink.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges.

recipes.title: Crispy ActiFry Fish Fillets
ingredients: 600 g white fish fillets (cod, haddock, or pollock)
steps: Cut fish into evenly sized fillets.
Pat fish dry and lightly season with salt.
Prepare three bowls: flour, beaten eggs, and panko mixed with paprika.
Dredge fish in flour, dip into egg, then coat with breadcrumbs.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Arrange fish in basket in a single layer.
Spray lightly with oil.
Cook 7 minutes.
Flip fillets carefully and spray again.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until golden and fish flakes easily.
Rest 2 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: ActiFry Salmon with Dijon Glaze
steps: Pat salmon dry and brush lightly with olive oil.
Mix Dijon mustard and honey in a small bowl.
Spread glaze evenly over top of salmon fillets.
Season lightly with salt and pepper.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place salmon skin-side down in basket.
Cook for 8 minutes.
Check doneness and cook 2–4 minutes more until flakes easily.
Remove carefully with spatula.
Rest 2 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Garlic Butter ActiFry Scallops
steps: Pat scallops very dry with paper towels.
Mix melted butter, olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Brush mixture over scallops.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Place scallops in a single layer.
Cook 5 minutes.
Flip scallops carefully.
Cook another 3–4 minutes until opaque and lightly browned.
Remove immediately to avoid overcooking.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Coconut Shrimp
ingredients: 500 g large shrimp, peeled and deveined
steps: Pat shrimp dry with paper towels.
Prepare breading bowls: flour, beaten eggs, and coconut mixed with panko and salt.
Dredge shrimp in flour, dip in egg, then press into coconut mixture.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Arrange shrimp in basket in a single layer.
Spray lightly with oil.
Cook 6 minutes.
Flip shrimp and spray again.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until golden.
Serve immediately with sweet chili sauce.

recipes.title: ActiFry Cajun Salmon Bites
steps: Cut salmon into evenly sized cubes.
Toss salmon with olive oil, Cajun seasoning, and salt.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Add salmon cubes in a single layer.
Cook 5 minutes.
Shake basket gently.
Cook another 4–6 minutes until salmon is cooked through.
Check for flakiness.
Remove carefully.
Serve as bowl topping or appetizer.

recipes.title: ActiFry Fish Tacos Filling
steps: Cut fish into bite-size strips.
Toss fish with olive oil and spices until coated.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place fish in basket in a single layer.
Cook 6 minutes.
Shake basket gently.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until cooked through.
Rest 2 minutes.
Use as filling for tacos.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Herb Crusted ActiFry Cod
steps: Pat cod fillets dry.
Mix panko, parsley, garlic powder, and salt.
Brush cod lightly with olive oil.
Press breadcrumb mixture onto top of fillets.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place fillets breadcrumb-side up in basket.
Cook 10 minutes.
Check doneness and cook 4–6 minutes more until flaky.
Remove carefully.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Garlic Mussels
steps: Rinse mussels and discard any open or cracked shells.
Toss mussels with olive oil and garlic.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Place mussels in basket.
Cook for 8 minutes.
Shake basket carefully.
Cook another 4–6 minutes until shells open.
Discard any unopened mussels.
Sprinkle with parsley.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: ActiFry Teriyaki Salmon
steps: Pat salmon dry and brush with teriyaki sauce.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place salmon skin-side down in basket.
Cook 8 minutes.
Brush with remaining sauce.
Cook another 4–6 minutes until glazed and flaky.
Remove carefully.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Rest 2 minutes.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Roasted Broccoli
ingredients: 2 large broccoli heads, cut into florets
steps: Wash broccoli and dry very well with towels.
Cut broccoli into evenly sized florets.
Place broccoli in a bowl and add olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Toss until all florets are evenly coated.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Add broccoli to the basket in a single layer.
Cook for 8 minutes.
Shake basket to redistribute florets.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until edges are browned.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Crispy ActiFry Zucchini Slices
steps: Slice zucchinis into uniform rounds about 1 cm thick.
Pat slices dry with paper towels.
Place in a bowl with olive oil, salt, pepper, and Italian seasoning.
Toss until evenly coated.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Arrange slices in a single layer.
Cook 7 minutes.
Flip slices carefully.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until golden.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Garlic Green Beans
steps: Wash and trim green beans.
Dry thoroughly with paper towels.
Toss beans with olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Add beans to basket.
Cook 7 minutes.
Shake basket.
Cook another 6–7 minutes until tender-crisp.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Parmesan ActiFry Asparagus
steps: Trim woody ends from asparagus.
Toss asparagus with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place asparagus in basket.
Cook for 7 minutes.
Sprinkle parmesan evenly over asparagus.
Cook another 3–4 minutes until cheese melts.
Check tenderness with fork.
Remove carefully.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Honey Glazed Carrots
steps: Peel carrots and slice into even sticks.
Toss carrots with olive oil and salt.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Cook carrots for 15 minutes, shaking halfway.
Drizzle honey over carrots and stir gently.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until glazed.
Check tenderness with fork.
Season with pepper.
Rest 2 minutes.
Serve warm.

recipes.title: Crispy ActiFry Cauliflower Bites
steps: Wash cauliflower and dry well.
Cut into evenly sized florets.
Toss florets with olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, and salt.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Add florets in single layer.
Cook 10 minutes.
Shake basket.
Cook another 8–10 minutes until crispy.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Stuffed Mushrooms
steps: Remove stems from mushrooms and clean caps.
Mix cream cheese, parmesan, garlic, and parsley.
Fill each mushroom cap with mixture.
Preheat ActiFry to 180°C (360°F).
Place mushrooms in basket.
Cook 10 minutes.
Increase temperature to 200°C (390°F).
Cook another 4–6 minutes until tops are golden.
Remove carefully.
Serve warm.

recipes.title: ActiFry Roasted Bell Peppers and Onions
steps: Slice peppers and onion into even strips.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Add vegetables to basket.
Cook 10 minutes.
Shake basket.
Cook another 8–10 minutes until tender.
Check seasoning.
Rest 2 minutes.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Balsamic Brussels Sprouts
steps: Trim Brussels sprouts and cut in half.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Cook sprouts for 15 minutes, shaking halfway.
Drizzle balsamic vinegar over sprouts.
Cook another 5 minutes.
Check tenderness.
Adjust seasoning if needed.
Rest 2 minutes.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Spiced Eggplant Cubes
steps: Cut eggplant into evenly sized cubes.
Place cubes in a bowl with olive oil and spices.
Toss until evenly coated.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Add eggplant to basket.
Cook 15 minutes, shaking halfway.
Cook another 8–10 minutes until golden.
Check softness inside.
Adjust seasoning.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Classic Beef Burgers
steps: Place ground beef in a bowl and add salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Gently mix with hands just until combined (do not overmix).
Divide meat into 4 equal portions and shape into patties about 2 cm thick.
Press a small indentation in the center of each patty to prevent puffing.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place patties in basket with space between them.
Cook for 7 minutes.
Flip patties and cook another 6–8 minutes until internal temperature reaches 71°C / 160°F.
Remove burgers and rest 3 minutes.
Serve on buns or with sides.

recipes.title: ActiFry Juicy Turkey Burgers
steps: Combine ground turkey with olive oil, salt, pepper, and paprika.
Mix gently until just combined.
Form into 4 equal patties.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place patties in basket.
Cook 8 minutes.
Flip and cook another 7–9 minutes until internal temperature reaches 74°C / 165°F.
Rest 3 minutes before serving.
Serve with lettuce and tomato or on buns.
Store leftovers refrigerated up to 3 days.

recipes.title: ActiFry Cheeseburgers
steps: Season ground beef with salt and pepper.
Form into 4 patties.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Cook patties for 7 minutes.
Flip and cook another 5 minutes.
Place cheese slices on patties.
Cook 1–2 minutes until cheese melts.
Check internal temperature reaches 71°C / 160°F.
Rest 3 minutes.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: ActiFry BBQ Beef Meatballs
steps: Mix ground beef, breadcrumbs, egg, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Form mixture into small meatballs.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place meatballs in basket in a single layer.
Cook for 12 minutes, shaking halfway.
Warm BBQ sauce separately.
Transfer cooked meatballs to a bowl and toss with BBQ sauce.
Return to ActiFry for 2–3 minutes to set glaze.
Check internal temperature reaches 71°C / 160°F.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Garlic Steak Bites
steps: Pat steak cubes dry with paper towels.
Toss steak with olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Add steak cubes in single layer.
Cook 5 minutes.
Shake basket gently.
Cook another 4–6 minutes to desired doneness.
Rest 3 minutes before serving.
Adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: ActiFry Pork Chops
steps: Pat pork chops dry.
Rub with olive oil, salt, pepper, and paprika.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place pork chops in basket.
Cook 8 minutes.
Flip chops and cook another 8–10 minutes.
Check internal temperature reaches 63°C / 145°F.
Rest 5 minutes before serving.
Serve with vegetables.
Store leftovers up to 3 days refrigerated.

recipes.title: ActiFry Lamb Kofta
steps: Combine ground lamb with spices, salt, and pepper.
Mix gently and shape into oblong kofta shapes.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Place kofta in basket with space between.
Cook 10 minutes.
Turn kofta and cook another 8–10 minutes.
Check internal temperature reaches 71°C / 160°F.
Rest 3 minutes.
Serve with yogurt sauce or salad.
Enjoy hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Italian Sausages
steps: Lightly brush sausages with olive oil.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place sausages in basket.
Cook 10 minutes.
Turn sausages.
Cook another 10–12 minutes until browned.
Check internal temperature reaches 71°C / 160°F.
Rest 3 minutes.
Serve with mustard or peppers.
Store leftovers refrigerated.

recipes.title: ActiFry Stuffed Burgers
steps: Season ground beef with salt and pepper.
Divide into 8 thin patties.
Place cheese in center of 4 patties.
Top with remaining patties and seal edges well.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Cook burgers 8 minutes.
Flip and cook another 8–10 minutes.
Check internal temperature reaches 71°C / 160°F.
Rest 3 minutes.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Beef Kebabs
steps: Pat beef cubes dry.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Thread beef onto skewers.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Place skewers in basket.
Cook 8 minutes.
Turn skewers.
Cook another 6–8 minutes to desired doneness.
Rest 3 minutes.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: ActiFry Cinnamon Sugar Apple Chips
steps: Wash apples thoroughly and core them.
Slice apples very thin using a knife or mandoline.
Place slices in a bowl and sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar.
Toss gently until slices are evenly coated.
Preheat ActiFry to 160°C (320°F).
Arrange apple slices in a single layer.
Cook for 10 minutes.
Flip slices carefully.
Cook another 8–10 minutes until dry and lightly crisp.
Let cool completely to crisp further before serving.

recipes.title: ActiFry Chocolate Lava Cakes
steps: Grease ramekins with butter and dust lightly with flour.
Melt chocolate and butter together until smooth; let cool slightly.
Whisk eggs, egg yolks, and sugar until pale.
Fold melted chocolate mixture into eggs.
Gently fold in flour until just combined.
Divide batter evenly among ramekins.
Preheat ActiFry to 180°C (360°F).
Place ramekins in basket.
Cook for 8–10 minutes until edges are set but centers remain soft.
Rest 1 minute before serving.

recipes.title: ActiFry Classic Churros
steps: Bring water, butter, and sugar to a boil.
Remove from heat and stir in flour until a dough forms.
Let dough cool slightly, then beat in egg until smooth.
Transfer dough to piping bag with star tip.
Pipe churros onto parchment paper.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place churros in basket and spray lightly with oil.
Cook 10 minutes, turning once.
Cook 4–6 minutes more until golden.
Roll warm churros in cinnamon sugar.

recipes.title: ActiFry Banana Fritters
steps: Mash bananas in a bowl until smooth.
Whisk in egg and sugar.
Add flour and baking powder; mix until batter forms.
Preheat ActiFry to 180°C (360°F).
Spoon batter into small mounds on parchment.
Place in basket.
Cook 8 minutes.
Flip fritters gently.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until golden.
Cool slightly before serving.

recipes.title: ActiFry Baked Cheesecake Cups
steps: Mix graham crumbs with melted butter and press into ramekins.
Beat cream cheese, sugar, egg, and vanilla until smooth.
Pour filling over crust.
Preheat ActiFry to 170°C (340°F).
Place ramekins in basket.
Cook 14–16 minutes until set.
Remove and cool.
Chill at least 1 hour before serving.
Serve plain or with fruit.
Store refrigerated.

recipes.title: ActiFry Stuffed Baked Apples
steps: Core apples carefully, leaving base intact.
Mix brown sugar, nuts, and cinnamon.
Fill apples with mixture.
Top each with small piece of butter.
Preheat ActiFry to 180°C (360°F).
Place apples upright in basket.
Cook 18–22 minutes until tender.
Check softness with knife.
Remove carefully.
Serve warm.

recipes.title: ActiFry Peanut Butter Cookies
steps: Mix peanut butter, sugar, and egg until smooth.
Form dough into small balls.
Flatten slightly with fork.
Preheat ActiFry to 170°C (340°F).
Place cookies on parchment.
Cook 8 minutes.
Check firmness.
Cook 2 minutes more if needed.
Cool before serving.
Store airtight.

recipes.title: ActiFry Cinnamon Roll Bites
steps: Cut cinnamon rolls into quarters.
Preheat ActiFry to 180°C (360°F).
Spray basket lightly.
Place dough pieces in basket.
Cook 8 minutes.
Shake basket.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until golden.
Warm icing slightly.
Drizzle icing over bites.
Serve warm.

recipes.title: ActiFry Brownie Bites
steps: Grease small heat-safe molds.
Fill molds halfway with batter.
Preheat ActiFry to 170°C (340°F).
Place molds in basket.
Cook 12–14 minutes until set.
Check doneness with toothpick.
Remove carefully.
Cool slightly.
Serve warm or room temperature.

recipes.title: ActiFry Simple Chicken and Veggie Bowl
steps: Toss chicken slices with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Toss zucchini and bell pepper with a small drizzle of oil if needed.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place chicken in basket in a single layer.
Cook 6 minutes.
Shake basket and add vegetables.
Cook another 10–12 minutes until chicken reaches 75°C / 165°F and veggies are tender.
Rest 2 minutes.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: ActiFry Salmon and Asparagus Meal
steps: Pat salmon dry and season with salt and pepper.
Toss asparagus with olive oil and a pinch of salt.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place salmon skin-side down in basket.
Cook 6 minutes.
Add asparagus to basket alongside salmon.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until salmon flakes and asparagus is tender.
Drizzle lemon juice over salmon and asparagus.
Rest 2 minutes.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: ActiFry Turkey Meatballs with Spinach
steps: Mix turkey, egg, breadcrumbs, salt, and pepper until combined.
Form mixture into small meatballs.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place meatballs in basket in a single layer.
Cook 12 minutes, shaking halfway.
Add spinach to basket and stir gently.
Cook another 2–3 minutes until spinach wilts.
Check meatballs reach 74°C / 165°F internal temperature.
Rest 3 minutes.
Serve warm.

recipes.title: ActiFry Crispy Tofu Veggie Wrap Filling
ingredients: 400 g firm tofu, pressed and cubed
steps: Press tofu for 15 minutes and cut into cubes.
Toss tofu with soy sauce, olive oil, garlic powder, and cornstarch.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Cook tofu for 10 minutes, shaking halfway.
Add bell pepper slices to basket.
Cook another 8–10 minutes until tofu is golden and peppers are tender.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Rest 2 minutes.
Use as wrap or bowl filling.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: ActiFry Shrimp and Veggie Stir Bowl
steps: Pat shrimp dry and toss with olive oil and soy sauce.
Toss zucchini and carrot lightly with remaining oil if needed.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Cook vegetables for 8 minutes, shaking halfway.
Add shrimp to basket.
Cook another 6–8 minutes until shrimp are pink and opaque.
Add ginger if using and toss quickly.
Rest 1 minute.
Serve as bowl topping over rice or quinoa.
Serve hot.

recipes.title: ActiFry Mediterranean Chickpeas and Veggies
ingredients: 400 g canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed
steps: Dry chickpeas with paper towels.
Toss chickpeas and vegetables with olive oil, oregano, and salt.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Add mixture to basket.
Cook 10 minutes, shaking halfway.
Cook another 8–10 minutes until veggies are roasted.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Rest 2 minutes.
Serve as side or salad topping.
Store leftovers up to 3 days refrigerated.

recipes.title: ActiFry Lemon Herb Cod with Greens
steps: Pat cod dry and brush with olive oil.
Season cod with salt and pepper.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Place cod in basket.
Cook 10 minutes.
Add spinach to basket and drizzle with lemon juice.
Cook another 2–3 minutes until spinach wilts and cod flakes.
Rest 2 minutes.
Serve immediately.
Optional: add extra lemon wedges.

recipes.title: ActiFry Chicken Lettuce Wrap Filling
steps: Mix ground chicken with garlic, soy sauce, sesame oil, and diced carrots.
Preheat ActiFry to 190°C (375°F).
Add chicken mixture to basket in a heat-safe dish or foil tray.
Cook 10 minutes.
Stir mixture thoroughly to break up chicken.
Cook another 8–10 minutes until fully cooked (75°C / 165°F).
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Rest 2 minutes.
Serve in lettuce cups.
Store leftovers refrigerated.

recipes.title: ActiFry Veggie Egg Muffins
steps: Beat eggs with salt and pepper.
Stir in bell pepper and spinach.
Grease muffin cups or silicone molds.
Pour egg mixture evenly into cups.
Preheat ActiFry to 160°C (320°F).
Place molds in basket.
Cook 12–14 minutes until set.
Remove carefully.
Cool slightly before serving.
Store refrigerated up to 3 days.

recipes.title: ActiFry Mustard Herb Chicken Drumsticks
steps: Pat the chicken drumsticks completely dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, mix Dijon mustard, olive oil, thyme, rosemary, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Add drumsticks to the bowl and rub the marinade over all sides of the chicken.
Let the chicken rest at room temperature for 10 minutes to allow flavors to absorb.
Preheat the ActiFry to 190°C (375°F) for 3 minutes.
Place drumsticks in the basket in a single layer, leaving space between pieces.
Cook for 15 minutes.
Turn each drumstick carefully.
Cook another 15–18 minutes until the skin is golden and internal temperature reaches 75°C / 165°F.
Remove from ActiFry and let rest 5 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: ActiFry Creamy Tuscan Chicken Bites
ingredients: 700 g boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into bite-size pieces
steps: Pat chicken pieces dry with paper towels.
Season chicken with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
Preheat ActiFry to 200°C (390°F).
Add olive oil and chicken pieces to the basket in a single layer.
Cook chicken for 10 minutes, shaking halfway, until lightly golden.
While chicken cooks, mix heavy cream, parmesan, Italian seasoning, and sun-dried tomatoes in a bowl.
Reduce ActiFry temperature to 180°C (360°F).
Pour cream mixture over chicken and stir gently to coat.
Cook another 10–12 minutes, stirring once, until sauce thickens and chicken reaches 75°C / 165°F.
Rest 3 minutes before serving; serve over rice or with vegetables.
